author: micahke
description: Generate notes on any subject using OpenAI's GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 language models.

manifest.author: Micah Elias
manifest.description: Create a note using OpenAI's GPT-3 language model.
manifest.name: GPT-3 Notes

name: GPT-3 Notes

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### GPT-4 Integration!

* added options for GPT-4 by @micahke in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/19
* fixed bug that cuts off the first few characters of preview text

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/compare/0.2.7...0.2.8

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Regenerate by @gmq in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/15
* fix(): use most recent history item by @gmq in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/16

Adds the ability to regenerate your response after seeing the preview. Other small bug fixes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/compare/0.2.6...0.2.7

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Chatgpt model by @gmq in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/13

- Adds support for **GPT-Turbo** models


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/compare/0.2.5...0.2.6

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* gpt text streaming by @micahke in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/11
* small fixes for rate limit errors: this should be improved as a result of the change above ^


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/compare/0.2.4...0.3.0

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
# 0.2.3 hotfix (01/12/2023)
- added a retry method for users getting 401 request when generated a note

## What's Changed
* Add replacement tokens by @gmq in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/5
> Adds ability to generate note based on selected text in document. Also adds support for creating tokens in prompts.

* Edit output by @micahke in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/6
> Adds ability to edit GPT output before inserting in note.

## New Contributors
* @gmq made their first contribution in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/5
* @micahke made their first contribution in https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/micahke/obsidian-gpt3-notes/compare/0.2.1...0.2.3

releases.author: micahke
releases.description:
- added a prefix prompt to support popular phrases
- added a suffix prompt to support phrases
- added a history to select recent prompts
